parameters.query:
INSERT INTO assets (engagement_id, asset_value, asset_type, scope_status, owner_team, business_criticality, environment, notes)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.engagement_id }}',
  '{{ $json.asset_value.replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
  '{{ $json.asset_type }}',
  'in_scope',
  {{ $json.owner_team ? "'" + $json.owner_team + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.business_criticality }}',
  '{{ $json.environment }}',
  {{ $json.notes ? "'" + $json.notes.replace(/'/g,"''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}
)
ON CONFLICT (engagement_id, asset_value) DO UPDATE
  SET last_discovered = NOW(), asset_type = EXCLUDED.asset_type
RETURNING id, (xmax = 0) AS is_new;

UPDATE engagement_metrics
SET total_assets = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assets WHERE engagement_id = '{{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.engagement_id }}'),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE engagement_id = '{{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.engagement_id }}';

INSERT INTO audit_logs (event_type, actor, engagement_id, entity_type, entity_id, payload)
VALUES ('asset_discovered', 'wf03', '{{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.engagement_id }}', 'asset', '{{ $('Upsert Asset').first().json.id }}', '{"asset_value":"{{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.asset_value }}","asset_type":"{{ $('Classify Asset').first().json.asset_type }}"}'::jsonb);

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, asset_id: $('Upsert Asset').first().json.id, is_new: $('Upsert Asset').first().json.is_new }) }}

meta.description: RECON OS WF-03: Asset Discovery — registers and classifies in-scope assets. Called via webhook or sub-workflow. Hard-blocked for OOS assets. POST /webhook/recon-os/assets/submit
